prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低位次分别为约34133名、35784名、137749名（2023年出现断档异常）、62082名、54127名。2023年断档后，2024年大幅回升至6208 2名，2025年继续回升至54127名，近两年呈明显回暖趋势，2025年较2024年前移约7955名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年175人、2022年192人、2023年 200人、2024年189人、2025年202人、2026年190人。2026年计划较2025年减少12人，缩招约5.9%，在考生规模扩大的背景下，招生名额减少将加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南昌大学是国家211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第69–78名区间，2026年最新排名第74名，属于中上游211高校，综合实力稳健；2 026年声誉评价为偏正面，主要原因包括南昌大学男排在2025–2026赛季CUVA大学生排球联赛总决赛中以3:0战胜北京体育大学夺冠，显著提升了学校知名度和体育声誉；抖音热度 排名第43位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度有所升温；2023年曾出现投档线异常信号（与武汉大学比较的负面讨论），但近年已无明显负面舆情；南昌大学拥有食品科学与工程A+学科（全国顶尖），材料科学与工程为双一流建设学科；临床医学、口腔医学、麻醉学等医学类专业实力突出，法学、计算机、电气等 专业均为国家级一流本科专业建设点，学科覆盖面广。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化持续高热推荐，临床 医学、口腔医学、护理学保持推荐热度，法学分化观望但仍有较高关注度；土木建筑、生化环材、新闻传播等专业明显劝退。山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年（ 约68.1万）增加约3.9万人，增幅约5.7%，考生规模扩大使整体竞争加剧，2025年为441分，无明显波动；南 昌大学位于江西省南昌市，在山东省属于跨省招生；该校在山东的招生计划占总计划比例中等，无特殊地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次持续回升趋势、202 6年招生计划缩招约5.9%、山东省考生规模扩大约5.7%以及学校声誉偏正面（男排夺冠提升知名度）等因素，竞争压力较2025年有所加大。，但考生增加和声誉提升对位次有上推作用。预测2026年综合类最低位次约54197名，区间53697–54697名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（国家级一流本科专业建设点）
- 口腔医学（国家级一流本科专业建设点）
- 计算机科学与技术（国家级一流本科专业建设点）
- 电气工程及其自动化（国家级一流本科专业建设点）
- 临床医学（国家级一流本科专业建设点）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 软件工程（国家级一流本科专业建设点）
- 金融学（国家级一流本科专业建设点）
- 材料科学与工程（双一流建设学科，国家级一流本科专业建设点）
- 食品科学与工程（A+学科，国家级一流本科专业建设点，食品全国重点实验室）
- 自动化（国家级一流本科专业建设点）
- 汉语言文学（国家级一流本科专业建设点）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 护理学（国家级一流本科专业建设点）
- 土木工程（国家级一流本科专业建设点）
- 环境工程（国家级一流本科专业建设点）
- 水产养殖学（首批国家卓越农林人才培养计划专业点）
- 康复治疗学（国家级一流本科专业建设点）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约54197名（区间53697–54697名），建议考生在此区间内以二档专业为主力选择，一档专业作为冲刺目标，三档专业作为稳妥保底。一档中法学、口腔医学、计算机科 学与技术、临床医学等专业历年位次要求较高（约1.7万–2.1万名），远超预测区间，仅适合位次明显优于区间上限的高分考生冲刺；二档中食品科学与工程（A+学科）、材料科 学与工程（双一流）、软件工程、自动化等专业与预测区间较为匹配，是性价比最高的选择；三档中护理学、康复治疗学等专业就业前景良好且竞争相对缓和，适合位次接近区间 下限的考生保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the comprehensive category in Shandong Province were approximately 34,133, 35,784, 137,749 (an anomaly in 2023), 62,082, and 54,127, respectively. After the anomaly in 2023, there was a significant recovery to 62,082 in 2024, and a continued recovery to 54,127 in 2025, showing a clear warming trend in the past two years, with a forward shift of about 7,955 places in 2025 compared to 2024. The enrollment plan for Nanchang University in the comprehensive category in Shandong Province: 175 in 2021, 192 in 2022, 200 in 2023, 189 in 2024, 202 in 2025, and 190 in 2026. The 2026 plan is reduced by 12 compared to 2025, a decrease of about 5.9%. Against the backdrop of an expanding candidate pool, the reduction in enrollment places will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable in the 69th to 78th range in recent years, with the latest ranking in 2026 being 74th, placing it among the upper-middle tier of 211 universities with solid overall strength. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat positive, mainly due to the Nanchang University men's volleyball team winning the 2025-2026 CUVA University Volleyball League finals 3-0 against Beijing Sport University, significantly enhancing the university's visibility and sports reputation. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 43rd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting a rise in application attention. There was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line in 2023 (negative discussions compared to Wuhan University), but no significant negative public opinion in recent years. Nanchang University has an A+ discipline in Food Science and Engineering (top in the country), and Materials Science and Engineering is a Double First-Class construction discipline. Medical specialties such as Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Anesthesiology are strong, and majors like Law, Computer Science, and Electrical Engineering are all national first-class undergraduate program construction points, covering a wide range of disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended; Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Nursing maintain recommendation popularity; Law is divided and under observation but still has high attention; majors like Civil Engineering and Architecture, Biology, Chemistry, Environment and Materials, and Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Gaokao in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 from 2025 (approximately 681,000), an increase of about 5.7%. The expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall competition. The 2025 score was 441, with no significant fluctuation. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, and recruits across provinces in Shandong. Its enrollment plan in Shandong accounts for a moderate proportion of the total plan, with no special regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous recovery trend in rankings from 2024 to 2025, the reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan by about 5.9%, the expansion of the Shandong candidate pool by about 5.7%, and the somewhat positive school reputation (increased visibility from the men's volleyball championship), competition pressure has increased compared to 2025. However, the increase in candidates and reputation improvement have an upward push on rankings. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the comprehensive category in 2026 will be about 54,197, with a range of 53,697 to 54,697.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law (National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point)
- Stomatology (National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point)
- Computer Science and Technology (National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point)
- Clinical Medicine (National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Software Engineering (National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point)
- Finance (National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Double First-Class Construction Discipline, National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point)
- Food Science and Engineering (A+ Discipline, National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point, National Key Laboratory for Food)
- Automation (National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point)
- Chinese Language and Literature (National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Nursing (National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point)
- Civil Engineering (National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point)
- Environmental Engineering (National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point)
- Aquaculture (First Batch of National Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Training Program Points)
- Rehabilitation Therapy (National First-Class Undergraduate Program Construction Point).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 54,197 (range 53,697–54,697). It is recommended that candidates in this range use Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a sprint target, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. Among Tier 1, majors like Law, Stomatology, Computer Science and Technology, and Clinical Medicine have historically required higher rankings (about 17,000–21,000), far exceeding the predicted range, and are only suitable for high-scoring candidates with rankings significantly above the upper limit of the range. Among Tier 2, majors like Food Science and Engineering (A+ discipline), Materials Science and Engineering (Double First-Class), Software Engineering, and Automation are relatively well-matched with the predicted range and offer the best cost-performance ratio. Among Tier 3, majors like Nursing and Rehabilitation Therapy have good employment prospects and relatively mild competition, suitable for candidates with rankings near the lower limit of the range.
